final:
// // This module resets the output to 1 when reset is high, and increments the output on the falling edge of the clock.
module reset_controller(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    output reg [2:0] out
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            out <= 3'b000; // Reset output to 0
        end else begin
            out <= out + 1; // Increment output
            if (out == 3'b111) begin
                out <= 3'b000; // Wrap around when reaching 8
            end
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module resets the output to 1 when reset is high, and increments the output on the falling edge of the clock.
